title: Choosing the Wrong Language Costs AI Teams Months of Work
summary: Darren Builds AI argues that language choice significantly impacts AI development team productivity, particularly as teams grow. The video examines how Language Server Protocols (LSPs), type checking, and compile-time feedback prevent runtime errors, positioning TypeScript as preferable to Python for AI coding despite Python's prevalence.
